summary: Phase 3 testing complete: Intelligence Graph feature for tracking user activities and generated assets. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend Intelligence Graph page working with Overview, Activity Feed, and Analytics tabs.
features_tested: Intelligence logging: Invoice create logs event ✓
Intelligence logging: Document generate logs event ✓
Intelligence logging: Document save logs event ✓
Intelligence logging: Catalogue bulk add logs event ✓
Intelligence logging: Brand asset upload logs event ✓
Frontend: Overview tab with stats cards and entity counts ✓
Frontend: Activity Feed tab with filtering by entity type ✓
Frontend: Analytics tab with activity trend chart ✓
Frontend: Sidebar link to Intelligence Graph ✓

intelligence_graph_apis.description: All Intelligence Graph API endpoints (insights, events, summary, timeline, stats)

intelligence_logging_integration.description: Verify events are logged when creating invoices, documents, catalogue items, brand assets

elements_verified: Stats cards: Today's Activity, This Month, Invoices, Catalogue Items
Recent Activity list with event descriptions
Analytics tab with Activity Trend chart

fixes_applied: Added Intelligence Graph link to sidebar (EnterpriseSidebar.js)
Fixed formatEventDescription to handle old 'type' field and new 'eventType' field
Fixed array mutation issue with activitySummary.reverse()
Added null checks for event properties to prevent 'Cannot read properties of undefined' errors
seed_data_creation: Created test events during testing via invoice creation, document generation, catalogue bulk add, and brand asset upload. Cleanup performed to remove TEST_ prefixed items.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Intelligence Graph feature fully implemented and tested: 1) IntelligenceGraphService with event logging, activity summaries, insights aggregation, and entity timeline tracking. 2) Helper functions (log_invoice_event, log_document_event, log_catalogue_event, log_brand_event) integrated into respective services. 3) Frontend Intelligence Graph page at /intelligence-graph with Overview, Activity Feed, and Analytics tabs. 4) Sidebar updated with Intelligence Graph link. 5) Old events in database have 'type' field, new events have 'eventType' and 'entityType' fields - frontend handles both formats. All 15 backend tests pass. Previous iterations covered WebSocket notifications, Custom Domains, Team Collaboration, AI Website Builder, Product Catalogue, Business Documents, Enhanced Invoicing with PDF generation.
